visible_results.title: 새내기를 위한 7분 술게임 특강 (새터 가기 전 필수시청)
리본이 알려주는 술게임 1탄! ㅣ 딸기, 두부, 이중모션 게임

query_runs.finding: The first ten visible results were all Korean drinking-game tutorials or named-game demonstrations. The recurring content carriers were 특강, 1탄 and 10초 술게임 rather than a stable person-role slang term.

detail_reviews.title: 새내기를 위한 7분 술게임 특강 (새터 가기 전 필수시청)
detail_reviews.description_context: A seven-minute lecture for freshmen before 새터, MT and other events; the creator says it covers basic games and asks viewers to leave newer games in comments.
detail_reviews.transcript_status: The transcript surface was opened, but no segment text loaded. Only the creator-written description and chapter labels are treated as directly observed text.
detail_reviews.mechanism_signal: Tutorial packaging plus rhythm-game and basic-game chapters is structurally equivalent to a host handbook or lesson series.
detail_reviews.safety_guard: Game demonstrations may attach failure to alcohol. Product use must keep only rhythm, turn order and response mechanics, with points or opt-in non-alcohol alternatives.

cross_reference.note: The separate public-web sweep verified six additional Korean videos with Korean automatic-caption tracks. It did not claim transcript text when the anonymous caption body was empty.

limitations: Search order, metrics and availability are a dated personalized snapshot.
Only one result was opened for a full in-app detail review in this live pass.
No transcript segment text was stored or inferred when the transcript panel returned no segments.
No comments were copied; the description's request for newer-game comments is recorded only as a discovery route.
